A hand uses a wooden spoon to stir the meat while another sprinkles yellow and green seasonings from a small glass bowl. Distinct piles of spices rest on the beef before being mixed in thoroughly. White text listing specific seasoning measurements appears at the top of the frame during this process, and fingers later touch the dark base of the appliance.
